differentials.name: INFRAMESOCOLIC SPACES [Right inframesocolic space] [Left inframesocolic space]
present only if peritoneum reflects posterior to cecum
differentials.raw: present only if peritoneum reflects posterior to cecum

context: Location:   lateral to ascending + descending colon Location:   medial to ascending colon √  limited inferiorly by attachment of small bowel mesentery to cecum Location:   medial to descending colon √  communicates freely with pelvis Location:   above + below terminal ileum Location:   along undersurface of sigmoid mesocolon
